examples: tip the arrow with the small stone

meanings.definition: give a tip or gratuity to in return for a service, beyond the compensation agreed on
cause to topple or tumble by pushing
to incline or bend from a vertical position

examples: He tapped me on the shoulder

meanings.definition: give insider information or advise to
examples: He tipped off the police about the terrorist plot

meanings.definition: having a tip; or having a tip as specified (used in combination)
departing or being caused to depart from the true vertical or horizontal
